subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath rent asunder the waters of the Qur'an and the Bayán through His Name, at Whose appearance all religions bowed down in submission [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی فتق بین ماء الفرقان و البیان باسمه الذی اذ ظهر خضعت الادیان و
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
